name: review reusable script
prompt: Review these candidate OCUDU helper scripts under .local/ocudu/promote and classify them as keep rewrite or drop.

name: promote new ocudu skill
prompt: Turn these reusable notes and scripts into a new ocudu-* skill and scaffold the tracked files.

name: update existing skill
prompt: Update an existing Skillful RAN skill from cleaned candidate files and keep a backup first.

name: dry run promotion
prompt: Prepare the skill draft under .local/ocudu/promote but do not write tracked files yet.

name: not build install
prompt: Clone srsRAN Project and compile it inside the local OCUDU workspace.

name: not host audit
prompt: Check whether this Linux workstation is missing SCTP or FFTW development packages.

name: not smoke test
prompt: Run local gnb smoke checks against the build tree.

name: not broad docs
prompt: Write a long free-form manual about Open RAN history without candidate files to review.
notes: Out of scope for the packaging skill.
